de.uka.ilkd.key.gui

Interface InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    BlockContractCompletion, DependencyContractCompletion, FunctionalOperationContractCompletion, JoinRuleCompletion, LoopInvariantRuleCompletion

    public interface InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion
    Instances of class implementing this interface are able to complete rule applications. At the moment they are only responsible for built-in rule apps, but they should be generalized to treat taclets as well.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean canComplete(IBuiltInRuleApp app)
      checks if this instance is responsible for the given app
      IBuiltInRuleApp complete(IBuiltInRuleApp app, Goal goal, boolean forced)
      method called to complete the given builtin rule application

    • Method Detail

      • complete

        IBuiltInRuleApp complete(IBuiltInRuleApp app,
                         Goal goal,
                         boolean forced)
        method called to complete the given builtin rule application
        Parameters:
        app - the app to complete
        goal - the goal where the app will be applied
        forced - a boolean indicating if the user shall be bothered if the instantiation is unique or can be chosen in a reasonable way as if unique
        Returns:
        the completed app or null if completion was not possible

      • canComplete

        boolean canComplete(IBuiltInRuleApp app)
        checks if this instance is responsible for the given app
        Parameters:
        app - the rule app
        Returns:
        true iff this instance might be able to complete the app
